assertions.title: Image Generation Returns Typed Payloads and Streamed Image Events
assertions.reason: `cargo test --test images_contract -- --nocapture` passed `images_generate_edit_and_variation_preserve_typed_and_multipart_contracts`, confirming `images.generate` posted JSON to `/v1/images/generations` and parsed `created`, mixed `b64_json`/`url` entries, and `usage.total_tokens`. `cargo test --test images_stream_contract -- --nocapture` passed `images_generate_and_edit_stream_surface_partial_and_completed_events`, `image_stream_yields_incremental_generation_events_before_terminal_tail_arrives`, `image_stream_requires_terminal_completed_event`, and `image_stream_rejects_eof_truncated_transcripts_without_completed_event`, confirming ordered `image_generation.partial_image` then `image_generation.completed` SSE events with base64 payloads/metadata, incremental delivery before the delayed terminal tail, and parse failures when the terminal completed event is missing or truncated.

assertions.title: Image Edit Builds Multipart Bodies for One-or-Many Source Images and Optional Mask
assertions.reason: `cargo test --test images_contract -- --nocapture` passed `images_generate_edit_and_variation_preserve_typed_and_multipart_contracts`, which inspected the `/v1/images/edits` multipart body and proved repeated `image` parts stayed in caller order, preserved filenames/content types/byte fidelity, preserved the optional `mask`, and forwarded non-file fields including `background`, `output_format`, `quality`, and `partial_images`. `cargo test --test images_stream_contract -- --nocapture` passed `images_generate_and_edit_stream_surface_partial_and_completed_events` and `image_edit_stream_rejects_eof_truncated_transcripts_without_completed_event`, confirming streamed `image_edit.partial_image`/`image_edit.completed` parsing and the terminal completion guard on truncated edit streams.

assertions.title: Image Variation Preserves the Single-PNG DALL·E Contract
assertions.reason: `cargo test --test images_contract -- --nocapture` passed `images_generate_edit_and_variation_preserve_typed_and_multipart_contracts`, which verified `/v1/images/variations` sent exactly one `image` multipart part with preserved filename (`frame-2.png`), content type (`image/png`), and byte fidelity, while also preserving `response_format=b64_json`, `size=1024x1024`, and parsing the returned variation payload without conflating base64 and URL response modes.

commands.observation: The `images_contract` test binary finished successfully with 1/1 tests passing: `images_generate_edit_and_variation_preserve_typed_and_multipart_contracts`.

The `images_stream_contract` test binary finished successfully with 5/5 tests passing: `image_stream_rejects_eof_truncated_transcripts_without_completed_event`, `image_edit_stream_rejects_eof_truncated_transcripts_without_completed_event`, `image_stream_requires_terminal_completed_event`, `images_generate_and_edit_stream_surface_partial_and_completed_events`, and `image_stream_yields_incremental_generation_events_before_terminal_tail_arrives`.

summary: All 3 assigned media image assertions passed under the mocked cargo validation surface: typed image generation parsing, multipart edit/variation fidelity, streamed partial/completed image events, and terminal completion guards were all confirmed by the required test runs.
